title: SensitivityMethodologiesPartyElection
description: A class to specificy methodologies to compute sensitivities specific to the agreement.

party.description: The party to which the election applies.

sensitivityToEquity.description: The methodology to compute sensitivities to equity indices, funds and ETFs for the purpose of Initial Margin agreements.

sensitivityToCommodity.description: The methodology to compute sensitivities to commodity indices for the purpose of Initial Margin agreements.
